---
title: "Contact"
subtitle: "Get in Touch & Professional References"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-title: "Sections"
---

## Let's Connect

I am open to opportunities, collaborations, and professional networking. Whether you're a recruiter, a fellow student, or a community organisation looking for a data-savvy volunteer — I'd love to hear from you.

---

## Contact Details

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="50%"}

### Direct Contact

{{< fa envelope >}} **Email**
[shiva.sagar@keuka.edu](mailto:shiva.sagar@keuka.edu)

{{< fa brands linkedin >}} **LinkedIn**
[linkedin.com/in/shiva-sagar](https://www.linkedin.com/in/shiva-sagar){target="_blank"}

{{< fa brands github >}} **GitHub**
[github.com/shivasagarsulige2-rgb](https://github.com/shivasagarsulige2-rgb){target="_blank"}

:::

::: {.column width="50%"}

### Location & Availability

{{< fa location-dot >}} **Based in:** Penn Yan, New York
{{< fa clock >}} **Time Zone:** ET (UTC−5 / UTC−4)
{{< fa calendar-check >}} **Availability:** Open to opportunities from May 2025

:::

:::

---

## Professional References

::: {.callout-note title="Reference Availability"}
Full references — including phone numbers and institutional emails — are available upon request. Please reach out via email to ask for a complete reference sheet.
:::

### Reference 1 — Academic Supervisor

**Dr. [Faculty Supervisor Name]**
*Assistant Professor of Data Science*
Keuka College, Penn Yan, NY

- {{< fa envelope >}} Available upon request
- *Relationship: Academic supervisor for Field Period Demonstrator role (2023–present) and data science coursework*

---

### Reference 2 — Community / Leadership Reference

**[Campus Activities Board Advisor Name]**
*Director of Student Engagement*
Keuka College, Penn Yan, NY

- {{< fa envelope >}} Available upon request
- {{< fa brands linkedin >}} [LinkedIn Profile](https://www.linkedin.com){target="_blank"}
- *Relationship: Faculty advisor for Campus Activities Board during presidency (2022) and ongoing student leadership*

---

### Reference 3 — Volunteer Reference

**[Volunteer Coordinator Name]**
*Volunteer Coordinator*
Everybunny Counts Rabbit Rescue, Connecticut

- {{< fa envelope >}} Available upon request
- *Relationship: Volunteer supervisor for animal rescue and care activities*

---

## Response Time

I aim to respond within **2 business days**.

::: {.callout-tip title="Best Way to Reach Me"}
Email is the most reliable channel. For professional enquiries, please include a brief subject line describing your purpose — e.g., *"Internship Opportunity — Data Analyst"* or *"Collaboration Enquiry"*.
:::

---

## Open to Opportunities

I am currently open to:

- [x] Data science internships (summer 2025)
- [x] Part-time research assistant roles
- [x] Volunteer data projects for nonprofits
- [ ] Full-time entry-level positions (from graduation, May 2025)
- [ ] Speaking or panel opportunities on student leadership and data science

---

*Thank you for visiting my portfolio. I look forward to hearing from you!*
